prestazioni: Engine: EJ257 (closed-deck, forged internals, 9.0:1 compression) with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) paired with a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate for precise boost control at 28 psi peak pressure, supported by a Cobb Tuning Big SF intake and a custom 3.5" aluminum intercooler piping system with a PWR 4.5-core front-mount intercooler (1200cfm airflow capacity).

Drivetrain: STI-spec 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a PPG straight-cut 1st/2nd gear set (2.58/1.91 ratios) and a Cusco Type-RS twin-plate clutch (240mm, 800kg clamping force) mated to a Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD for the rear differential and a KAAZ 2-way clutch-type front LSD, with all differentials filled with Motul Gear 300 75W-90 fluid.

Suspension/Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable compression/rebound, 8kg/mm front springs, 9kg/mm rear springs) with spherical bearing top mounts (SuperPro 60mm front, 55mm rear) and Whiteline adjustable front sway bar (24mm hollow, 12-position adjustability) paired with a Cusco rear sway bar (22mm solid). Braking system upgraded to Endless CC-RG6 6-piston front calipers (356mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (345mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: Seibon Carbon fiber widebody conversion kit (STI S209-specific, 30mm extended fenders front/rear) with a Voltex Type-7 rear wing (1200mm span, 3D carbon fiber construction) and a custom carbon fiber front splitter (50mm overhang, 3-stage gurney flap) paired with a Varis Japan rear diffuser (3-piece, 40mm ground clearance).

Exterior: STI S209-specific BBS RE-RII forged wheels (19x9.5 +38 front, 19x10.5 +45 rear) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) with custom gold powdercoat and STI-branded center caps. Full STI S209 decal kit (matte black/gunmetal) with a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 30% weight reduction) featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler airflow.

Interior: Bride Zeta III STI-spec bucket seats (FIA-approved, carbon fiber shell) with Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM model) and a custom roll cage (1.75" x .120" DOM steel, 8-point, bolt-in) by Cusco. Steering wheel replaced with a NRG Innovations ST-40R (350mm, suede) and shift knob upgraded to a PERRIN short-throw adapter with a titanium shift knob (MOMO Prototipo). Full interior wrapped in Alcantara (Katzkin, custom STI blue stitching) with carbon fiber trim (dashboard, door cards, center console) by Seibon.
